description_en: Kyoto may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 5 halal restaurants and 14 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Kyoto, Japan, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Kyoto: 44 halal restaurants listed, 14 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
